code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment based solely on the review text
    - Base rating on holistic satisfaction, not isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1â˜… (Very Negative):
    - Safety hazards/multi-purchase failures overriding positives
    - Fundamental usability failures despite concept appeal
    - Premature failure (â‰¤6 months) with functional consequences
    - "Avoid purchase" warnings with defect evidence
    - Negative updates erase previous satisfaction (including multi-unit purchases)
    - Immediate disposal due to critical defects
    - Design flaws causing persistent frustration during core functionality

    2â˜… (Negative):
    - Core functionality requires excessive workarounds
    - Partial functionality with persistent frustration
    - Clearly inferior to alternatives in critical aspects
    - "Regret purchase" statements with justification
    - Temporary functionality followed by rapid degradation

    3â˜… (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with contextual limitations
    - Conditional recommendations ("works if...")
    - Adequate performance with notable compromises
    - Temporary solutions requiring frequent adjustments

    4â˜… (Positive):
    - Single functional flaw impacting core utility
    - Functional limitation in primary use case (even if suitable elsewhere)
    - Requires preprocessing/break-in for full function
    - Explicit star deduction phrases ("only 4 because...")
    - Brand comparisons with minor shortcomings
    - Meeting expectations without enthusiastic endorsement
    - Brief praise with 1-2 benefits lacking enthusiasm

    5â˜… (Very Positive):
    - Solves persistent problems through daily reliability
    - 3+ practical benefits praised (durability/utility/cost-effectiveness)
    - Non-functional criticism WITH enthusiastic core praise
    - Explicit "still 5 stars" despite imperfections
    - Targeted recommendations solving specific group needs
    - Replacement purchases/continuous use despite part replacements
    - Practical benefits outweigh all criticisms
    - Explicit suitability for niche use cases with demonstrated value

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Primary use limitation â†’4 even if suitable elsewhere
    - Praise + functional flaw â†’4 / + non-functional â†’5
    - "Works as intended" + validation â†’5 / neutral confirmation â†’4
    - Multi-aspect criticism + final endorsement â†’5
    - Cost-effective solutions for specific needs â†’5
    - Brief enthusiastic praise ("Perfect!") â†’5 / generic praise â†’4
    - Negative experience with different purchase version â†’1 if mentioned as pattern
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Second unit failed faster. Dangerous defects!"
<Reasoning>Multi-purchase safety failures â†’1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "This beautiful mug is too small for coffee - perfect for tea decor"
<Reasoning>Primary use limitation despite alternative suitability â†’4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Pyrex lids wore out but containers remain daily drivers"
<Reasoning>Continuous core satisfaction despite replacements â†’5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Blender overheats after 2 minutes but still chops"
<Reasoning>Core functionality with dangerous flaw â†’2</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Perfect magnets! Strong hold and ideal size PLUS easy installation"
<Reasoning>3 benefits + enthusiastic praise â†’5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Good for trundle bed - shallow but comfortable with great features"
<Reasoning>Targeted niche recommendation with multiple benefits â†’5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 3mo. Never again this brand"
<Reasoning>Definitive failure update â†’1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Knife cuts well but uncomfortable handle - okay for occasional use"
<Reasoning>Mixed performance with limitations â†’3</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Inexpensive solution for sending leftovers - don't care if lost"
<Reasoning>Cost-effective practical benefit â†’5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Persistent leaks ruin core functionality despite good concept"
<Reasoning>Fundamental usability failure â†’1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (25 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 10
  gold 5 -> 4: 7
  gold 2 -> 1: 2
  gold 1 -> 5: 1
  gold 4 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  3. Review: "Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. Th..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 2, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  4. Review: "I can forgive the fact that there was blood on one of the math mats when I opened the package.  Things happen and I'm sorry that someone was injured.  What I can't get past is the fact that there are so many snags.  It's like these two mats were seco..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.33
  5. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Made my first batch of hard boiled eggs and it was great! I didn't read the directions close enough and closed the lid....it is to remain just as a cover, not locked. The eggs were pretty easy to pierce and the best part was that after they were done..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Very nice set of skillets - and what a lovely color.  Quite a bargain, and I was glad to find it as I provide my husband his "own" skillets.  He tends to be a "high heat" cook, and so I don't let him use my expensive skillets.  Was nice to find Farbe..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "After a couple days a giant (though compact by queen sized bed standards) box arrived, and while I anticipated the weight (I've had a few of these shipped to me), it's still heavy.  Ideally you'll get this unpacked in the AM, as it does take a moment..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [3, 5, 5] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I bought this machine after reading pretty good customer reviews and boy how I regret it.

The first time I used it I noticed more spots when I was through than when I started. My granddaughter can be a bit messy and I bought this to clean little dri..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.33
  3. Review: "These mats are fine if you like to switch them out a lot. If you refer to have a very fresh and new bathmat for the bathroom when guests are staying for a visit, then these have a fun knobbly like texture to them and are cheap enough to pick up for s..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [1, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33

Summary: 25 errors, 24 borderline out of 80 examples."}
